name: flagship-comparison
prompt: Summarize the following ticket in one sentence: The customer cannot log in after changing their email address.

prompts.name: support-reply
prompts.system_prompt: You are a support agent. Reply in two sentences, professional and warm.
prompts.prompt: A customer writes: 'I changed my email address yesterday and now I cannot log in. I have a presentation in an hour and my files are in your app. Please help.' Write the reply.

prompts.name: ticket-to-json
prompts.system_prompt: Return only valid JSON, no Markdown fences or commentary.
prompts.prompt: Extract from this ticket into JSON with keys issue, urgency (low|medium|high), product_area: 'I changed my email address yesterday and now I cannot log in. I have a presentation in an hour and my files are in your app.'
